title: AWS Infrastructure Automation
description: Provisioned and managed AWS resources including EC2, VPC, RDS, IAM, Security Groups, and S3 using Terraform-based IaC workflows.
impact: Standardized infrastructure creation and improved deployment consistency across environments.

title: Centralized Monitoring and Log Management
description: Implemented ELK Stack for centralized log analysis and configured CloudWatch with SNS alerts for proactive monitoring.
impact: Improved production troubleshooting speed and reduced incident response time through unified visibility.

title: Jenkins to Kubernetes CI/CD
description: Designed end-to-end Jenkins pipelines integrating Git, Maven, Docker, and Kubernetes for automated build and deployment.
impact: Reduced provisioning time from 8 hours to under 10 minutes with containerized deployment automation.
